description_long: This clock tower features a tall, rectangular shaft with a wood-textured surface, topped by a square clock chamber. The clock chamber is adorned with a large, round clock face on each visible side, each encircled by a gold border and displaying black Roman numerals and ornate black clock hands. Above the clock chamber rises a steep, pointed spire with a metallic, ribbed texture, capped with a small finial. The structure's base and shaft are visually dominated by a warm, brown wood grain pattern, while the upper spire contrasts with a silvery-gray metallic finish. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic European clock towers, blending classical and slightly modernized elements. No visible doors or windows are present on the shaft, emphasizing its function as a landmark rather than an accessible building.
description: A tall, wood-textured clock tower with a gold-trimmed clock face and a pointed metallic spire, reminiscent of classic European landmarks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face with Roman numerals, gold trim, and the full height of the wood-textured shaft and metallic spire.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the clock face and spire visible, but slight shading differences on the shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view with the clock face and spire, but the spire appears lighter, possibly due to lighting or material variation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the clock face and spire visible, and consistent wood texture on the shaft.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is round with a white background, black Roman numerals, black minute and hour hands, and a gold circular border. The face includes minute tick marks and a central decorative element. The design is classic and ornate, with clear, bold markings.
